title: Microsoft is reportedly training salespeople to talk down OpenAI and Anthropic
summary: Microsoft is instructing its sales team to position proprietary AI models as more efficient and cost-effective alternatives to competitors like OpenAI and Anthropic, signaling a shift to promote its own AI capabilities.
content: Microsoft is looking to sell its in-house AI models as more efficient and cost-effective than its competitors' models.

zh.title: 据报道微软在培训销售人员贬低OpenAI和Anthropic
zh.summary: 微软正在指示其销售团队将专有AI模型定位为比OpenAI和Anthropic等竞争对手更高效、更具成本效益的替代方案，标志着其转向推广自有AI能力的转变。

title: HP’s OLED-equipped 2-in-1 laptop is a solid back-to-school deal
summary: Best Buy is offering the HP OmniBook X Flip 2-in-1 laptop with OLED touchscreen at $999.99 (down from $1,649.99), featuring Intel Core 7 Ultra, 16GB RAM, and Copilot Plus integration.
content:
HP’s convertible OmniBook has a great feature set for the price. | Image: HP	

With storage and memory prices still at an all-time high, we’re happy to tell you about a solid deal on a good laptop when we find one, rare as they are. Best Buy is selling the HP OmniBook X Flip 2 in 1 for $999.99 (usually $1,649.99) with an Intel Core 7 Ultra CPU, 16GB of LPDDR5X memory, and a 1TB SSD. The star of the show is the 1920 x 1200 OLED touchscreen, an uncommon perk at this price point. It will display deeper black levels and have faster response times than screens in other similarly-priced models. Also, it has a 360-degree hinge that lets the screen flip so you can use it like a tablet instead, or tent it if you need some portable entertainment.
HP OmniBook X Flip 2 in 1

Where to Buy:

 $1649.99 $999.99 at Best Buy

This model, like other OmniBooks in this year’s lineup, is a Copilot Plus machine, meaning it has a dedicated neural processing unit (NPU) to assist with specialized tasks like helping you quickly find files or live transcribing videos. Whether you use Copilot or not, there’s plenty else to like about this model. For connectivity, the HP includes a pair of Thunderbolt 4 ports, HDMI 2.1, two USB-A ports, a 3.5mm headphone jack, Wi-Fi 7, and Bluetooth 6.0. One other perk is that the OLED screen has a 16:10 aspect ratio, so you’ll be able to see more content at once.

zh.title: 惠普配备OLED屏幕的2合1笔记本电脑是开学季的绝佳优惠
zh.summary: 百思买以$999.99的价格（原价$1,649.99）提供配备OLED触屏的HP OmniBook X Flip 2合1笔记本，搭载英特尔酷睿7 Ultra处理器、16GB内存，并集成Copilot Plus。

title: Apple’s reportedly raising the price for AppleCare Plus on Macs and iPads
summary: Apple is raising AppleCare Plus subscription costs for Macs and iPads by $0.50 monthly or $5 annually for new subscribers, with a 13-inch MacBook Air plan increasing to $7.99 from $7.49.
content:
An AppleCare Plus subscription for a Mac or iPad will cost more soon, with prices going up by $0.50 per month or $5 per year for new sign-ups while remaining the same for existing subscribers, according to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. Gurman says that under the new AppleCare Plus pricing, "a plan for a new 13-inch MacBook Air increased to $7.99 from $7.49, or to $79.99 from $74.99 annually," following a move last year that similarly raised the plan's price on iPhones. We haven't seen the new pricing reflected on Apple's site in the US or terms of service yet, and Apple has not yet responded to a request for comment.
Last month, Apple announced  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 苹果据称将提高Mac和iPad的AppleCare Plus价格
zh.summary: 苹果将提高Mac和iPad的AppleCare Plus订阅费用，新用户的月费将增加$0.50或年费增加$5，其中13英寸MacBook Air的计划价格将从$7.49上升到$7.99。

title: Hundreds rally at Bethesda HQ to protest Xbox layoffs, and Ars was there
summary: Hundreds of workers gathered at Xbox's Bethesda headquarters to protest ongoing layoffs, with labor unions calling for an end to the cycle of job cuts and return to contract negotiations.
content: Union wants to halt a "perpetual cycle" of layoffs, get back to contract bargaining.

zh.title: 数百人在Bethesda总部集会抗议Xbox裁员，Ars记者现场报道
zh.summary: 数百名员工在Xbox的Bethesda总部聚集抗议持续的裁员，劳工工会呼吁结束裁员循环并恢复合同谈判。

title: Valve says iFixit will keep selling Steam Deck batteries after all
summary: Valve clarified that iFixit will continue selling official replacement batteries for the Steam Deck LCD, with stock returning within a week, preserving user access for self-repairs.
content:
The Steam Deck’s internals, including the L-shaped battery.	

Valve has been incredibly friendly to customers who need repairs - which is why it was so surprising to hear  that Valve was already discontinuing the battery for the Steam Deck LCD handheld. It would have meant you could no longer just buy a battery from iFixit and install it yourself. Why would Valve stop stocking the most important replacement part just as people are starting to need it?
Here is Valve's answer to The Verge, as of 5PM ET: "We just confirmed with iFixit that they plan to have batteries back in stock by next week." 
"iFixit will be getting the same OEM parts sourced through Valve's partners that they always have," spokespe …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve表示iFixit将继续销售Steam Deck电池
zh.summary: Valve澄清iFixit将继续销售Steam Deck LCD的官方替换电池,库存将在一周内恢复,保持用户自修的便利性。

title: Buzz Aldrin sells famous felt-tip pen that helped launch Apollo from the Moon
summary: Buzz Aldrin sold a historic felt-tip pen used during the Apollo moon mission, though the sale did not set records for space memorabilia.
content: While an impressive sale, the pen and switch did not break records.

zh.title: 巴兹·奥尔德林出售曾用于阿波罗登月的著名油性笔
zh.summary: 巴兹·奥尔德林出售了一支在阿波罗登月任务中使用过的历史性油性笔,尽管这笔交易没有创造太空纪念品的拍卖纪录。

title: Sheetz is quitting VMware, migrating 11,000 virtual machines
summary: Sheetz convenience stores are migrating approximately 11,000 virtual machines away from VMware, switching to StorMagic as part of infrastructure modernization.
content: The convenience store chain will use StorMagic instead.

zh.title: Sheetz放弃VMware,迁移11,000台虚拟机
zh.summary: Sheetz便利店正在迁移约11,000台虚拟机,从VMware转向StorMagic,作为基础设施现代化的一部分。

title: xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
summary: Elon Musk's xAI is suing a South Carolina man accused of using the Grok AI chatbot to bypass safeguards and generate child sexual abuse material related to pending criminal charges.
content:
The Elon Musk-owned xAI is suing a South Carolina man who allegedly used the company's Grok AI chatbot to generate child sexual abuse material (CSAM). In a lawsuit reported earlier by Reuters, xAI claims Terry Wayne Harwood "knowingly and intentionally used Grok to circumvent safeguards, alter nonconsensual images, and generate and distribute CSAM," breaching the company's policies.
Harwood was arrested in February for allegedly possessing and distributing CSAM and is facing eight felony charges. The lawsuit claims "at least some" of the images related to Harwood's criminal charges "were generated or altered" with Grok, and that Harwood byp …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: xAI起诉一名男子使用Grok生成CSAM"深度伪造"
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克的xAI正在起诉一位南卡罗来纳州男子，该男子被指控使用Grok AI聊天机器人绕过安全措施并生成与待决刑事指控相关的儿童性虐待材料。

title: Brendan Carr plans to let broadcast giants dominate the airwaves
summary: FCC Chair Brendan Carr announced an August vote to eliminate the national media ownership cap, arguing that streaming and social media have made the rule obsolete despite criticism about broadcast monopolies.
content:
Federal Communications Commission | Image: Kristen Radtke / The Verge	

The Federal Communications Commission will vote next month on whether a single company can own broadcast stations that reach more than 39 percent of US TV households. 
In a Breitbart op-ed on Wednesday, Republican Chair Brendan Carr announced an August 6th vote to end the national ownership cap rule, which was intended to prevent one company from dominating the media landscape and incentivize serving local communities. Carr argued the rise of social media and streaming platforms renders the rule obsolete, because national programmers can reach "100 percent of the country" without the need to access public airwaves. Under this reasoning, cap …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 布伦丹·卡尔计划让广播巨头主宰电波
zh.summary: 美国联邦通信委员会主席布伦丹·卡尔宣布在8月投票取消国家媒体所有权上限，辩称流媒体和社交媒体已使该规则过时，尽管存在关于广播垄断的批评。

title: Judge: Trump can’t deport researchers just for working in content moderation
summary: A federal judge blocked visa denials and deportations targeting researchers employed in content moderation, with experts welcoming the ruling that protects academic and professional work.
content: Disinformation researchers praise ruling blocking Trump visa denials and deportations.

zh.title: 法官：特朗普不能仅因从事内容审核工作就驱逐研究人员
zh.summary: 联邦法官阻止了针对从事内容审核工作的研究人员的签证拒签和驱逐，专家们对这一保护学术和专业工作的裁决表示欢迎。

title: Engineer identifies and explains every '90s computer seen in Jurassic Park
summary: An engineer documented and identified every computer system featured in the 1990s film Jurassic Park, confirming the famous "it's Unix" line was technically accurate.
content: Yes, it was, in fact, a Unix system.

zh.summary: 一位工程师记录并识别了这部1990年代电影《侏罗纪公园》中出现的每个计算机系统，证实了著名的"这是Unix"这句话在技术上是准确的。

title: Tesla driver in fatal Texas crash pressed accelerator 100%, NTSB confirms
summary: The National Transportation Safety Board confirmed that a Tesla driver involved in a fatal Texas crash pressed the accelerator fully, corroborating Tesla's account of the incident.
content: The safety board confirmed Tesla's account of the crash, which the company shared days after it happened last month.

zh.title: 美国国家运输安全委员会确认特斯拉驾驶员在德州致命碰撞中踩下100%油门

title: Roblox is shutting down its video chat service
summary: Roblox is discontinuing its Roblox Connect video calling service launched in 2023, as users predominantly prefer the platform's party voice chat functionality for communication.
content:
Roblox will be shutting down Roblox Connect, its video calling service introduced in 2023.
Roblox Connect let you video chat with other people using your Roblox avatar, which would be able to mimic the movements you were making in real life. You could also run around with people on the call in a shared virtual environment. But in a statement, the company says that users 13 and older "predominantly" chat via the platform's party voice chat functionality for calls.
"Roblox Connect is being discontinued today, including both the developer-facing APIs and the Roblox Connect feature itself," Roblox spokesperson Angela Allison tells The Verge. " …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Roblox正在关闭其视频聊天服务
zh.summary: Roblox正在停止其2023年推出的Roblox Connect视频通话服务，因为用户主要更喜欢平台的派对语音聊天功能进行沟通。

title: AI slop movies are the new direct-to-video cash grabs
summary: Following Christopher Nolan's high-profile Odyssey adaptation, studios are rushing to capitalize on the buzz by producing AI-generated films, including an Odysseus-themed movie by Fountain 0. These AI-generated movies represent a new wave of low-cost, low-effort content designed to exploit trending topics rather than develop original stories. The trend reflects broader concerns about AI-generated content flooding entertainment markets.
content:
This weekend, cinephiles across the world will march to their local theaters to feast their eyes on Christopher Nolan's new adaptation of The Odyssey. It's on track to rake in anywhere between $80-$100 million in just a few days. People are clearly excited to see how Nolan uses cutting-edge filmmaking tech to make the Homeric classic feel fresh. But another director is trying to capitalize on the buzz around Nolan's project to drum up interest in an Odysseus-focused movie of his own.
On Tuesday, film studio Fountain 0 announced that it is working on an AI-generated reimagining of The Odyssey titled Odysseus: The Fall, which will be availabl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI生成电影成为新的直接发行圈钱手段
zh.summary: 继克里斯托弗·诺兰备受瞩目的《奥德赛》改编后，影视公司纷纷推出AI生成电影来借势获利，包括Fountain 0制作的《奥德修斯》主题电影。这些AI生成电影是一波低成本、低付出的内容，旨在利用热门话题而非开发原创故事。这一趋势反映了人们对AI生成内容泛滥娱乐市场的广泛担忧。

title: Windows 0-day drops the same day Microsoft releases record number of patches
summary: A critical Windows 0-day vulnerability dubbed HiveLegacy has been disclosed, described as a powerful primitive capable of various malicious actions. The timing is notable as Microsoft released a record number of security patches the same day. This underscores the ongoing cat-and-mouse game between attackers and defenders in cybersecurity.
content: HiveLegacy is a "powerful primitive" that's likely capable of other nefarious actions.

zh.title: Windows 0-day与微软创纪录的补丁同日发布
zh.summary: 被称为HiveLegacy的Windows 0-day关键漏洞已被披露，可用于执行各种恶意操作。值得注意的是，微软在同一天发布了创纪录数量的安全补丁。这突显了网络安全领域中攻击者与防御者之间持续的猫鼠游戏。

title: Daniel Ek’s body-scanning startup Neko Health raises another $700M
summary: Neko Health, founded by Spotify CEO Daniel Ek, has raised an additional $700M in funding for its proprietary body-scanning technology combined with bloodwork analysis. The platform assesses personal health through innovative scanning technology and offers a comprehensive health assessment approach. This substantial funding round reflects investor confidence in AI-driven preventive healthcare solutions.
content: Neko Health has developed proprietary body-scanning technology, which it couples with bloodwork, to assess a person's health.

zh.title: Daniel Ek的身体扫描初创公司Neko Health融资7亿美元
zh.summary: Spotify首席执行官Daniel Ek创办的Neko Health为其专有的身体扫描技术与血液检测分析融资7亿美元。该平台通过创新扫描技术评估个人健康状况，提供综合健康评估方法。这笔巨额融资反映了投资者对人工智能驱动的预防性医疗保健解决方案的信心。

title: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
summary: OpenAI has released the Codex keyboard, a $230 light-up keyboard designed to pair with its agentic coding application, marking its first branded hardware product. The launch comes amid a legal dispute with Apple over alleged hardware trade theft allegations. The keyboard serves as a physical interface for OpenAI's AI coding assistant, though the timing adds intrigue given the ongoing legal tensions.
content: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.

zh.title: 在硬件法律纠纷中，OpenAI发布230美元的Codex键盘
zh.summary: OpenAI发布了Codex键盘，这是一款价格为230美元的发光键盘，设计用于与其智能代码应用配套使用，标志着该公司首次推出品牌硬件产品。该产品发布恰逢OpenAI与苹果之间关于硬件商业秘密盗窃指控的法律纠纷。该键盘充当OpenAI人工智能编码助手的物理界面，但鉴于持续的法律紧张局势，发布时机增添了些许悬念。

title: FCC to repeal 39% TV ownership cap in boost for Trump-friendly news orgs
summary: The FCC chairman claims authority to repeal a television ownership cap of 39% that was established by Congress. The move would benefit news organizations viewed as favorable to former President Trump.
content: FCC chairman claims power to repeal TV ownership limit set by Congress.

zh.title: FCC废除39%电视所有权上限，有利于亲特朗普新闻机构
zh.summary: FCC主席声称有权废除国会制定的39%电视所有权上限。此举将有利于被视为对前总统特朗普友好的新闻机构。

title: Microsoft patches bug in video game Age of Empires II
summary: Microsoft has patched a critical vulnerability in the decades-old strategy game Age of Empires II. The security flaw could have allowed attackers to seize control of players' computers through malicious game invitations.
content: The vulnerability in the decades-old game could have allowed hackers to take over victims’ computers with a malicious game invite.

zh.title: 微软修复《帝国时代II》游戏漏洞
zh.summary: 微软已修补了这款历史悠久的策略游戏《帝国时代II》中的严重漏洞。该安全漏洞可能允许攻击者通过恶意游戏邀请控制玩家的计算机。

title: Enshittification
summary: Health authorities are investigating an outbreak of cyclosporiasis, a parasitic illness spread through fecal contamination that causes severe gastrointestinal distress. The infection has sickened multiple people across the United States.
content:
Bryan, a food broker from Michigan, wasn't sure if he'd be able to make it to urgent care in time. He started feeling off on Thursday, and by Saturday, he was having to use the bathroom every 15 to 30 minutes.
"It's no joke about the explosive diarrhea," Bryan, who asked that his last name be withheld for obvious reasons, told me. I met him via Reddit, where I recently spent hours lurking in threads about cyclosporiasis, the explosive diarrhea illness infecting people across the country, and Cyclospora cayetanensis, the microscopic parasite that causes it, which spreads through human fecal contamination. Symptoms - including nausea, loss of …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 恶质化
zh.summary: 卫生部门正在调查环孢子虫病的爆发情况，这是一种通过粪便污染传播的寄生虫病，会导致严重的胃肠道不适。该感染已在美国多地导致多人患病。

title: In memoriam: 7 of our favorite Sam Neill films
summary: Actor Sam Neill, renowned for his role in the 1993 film Jurassic Park, died Monday in Sydney, Australia, at age 78. The article celebrates some of his most memorable film performances.
content: The actor, who starred in 1993's Jurassic Park, died Monday in Sydney, Australia, at the age of 78.

zh.title: 纪念：我们最喜欢的7部萨姆·尼尔电影
zh.summary: 因1993年电影《侏罗纪公园》中的角色而闻名的演员萨姆·尼尔于周一在澳大利亚悉尼去世，享年78岁。该文章庆祝了他一些最难忘的电影表演。

title: Something’s glowing on the Pixel 11’s camera bar
summary: Google's upcoming Pixel 11 phones will feature a glowing, color-shifting orb on the camera bar, as shown in a teaser video on Google's store page. The feature may be related to the "Pixel Glow" light capability found in Android 17 betas and could integrate with Google's Gemini AI assistant.
content:
A new teaser for Google's upcoming Pixel 11 lineup reveals that the phones will feature some kind of glowing orb on the camera bar, as reported by 9to5Google.
Google's store page for the Pixel 11 has a short video that shows the glowing, color-shifting orb to the one side of the camera bar. The store page doesn't share any more information about it, but perhaps the orb is the "Pixel Glow" light feature that has popped up in Android 17 betas. If I had to guess, the orb will likely have something to do with Google's Gemini AI.

We probably won't have to wait too much longer to learn what the orb is all about. Google has announced an August 12 …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Pixel 11相机栏上有什么在发光
zh.summary: 谷歌即将推出的Pixel 11手机将在相机栏上配备一个发光、变色的球体，如谷歌商店页面上的预告视频所示。该功能可能与Android 17测试版中的"Pixel Glow"灯光功能有关，并可能与谷歌的Gemini人工智能助手集成。

title: Apple quietly reveals how its Maps ads will differ from Google’s
summary: Apple has published advertising policies for its upcoming Maps platform that impose stricter restrictions than Google's approach. The rules bar home service providers—plumbers, electricians, locksmiths, roofers—and other sensitive categories from advertising.
content: Apple has published the policies governing its upcoming Maps advertising business, revealing a strategy that differs from Google’s. The new rules prohibit home services businesses like plumbers, electricians, locksmiths, and roofers from advertising on Apple Maps, along with several other sensitive categories, suggesting Apple is taking a more curated approach to these ads.

zh.title: 苹果悄悄透露其地图广告与谷歌的区别
zh.summary: 苹果公布了即将推出的地图平台的广告政策，这些政策相比谷歌的方式施加了更严格的限制。这些规则禁止家庭服务提供商（如水管工、电工、锁匠、屋顶工）和其他敏感类别投放广告。

title: SpaceX slips below its $135 IPO price ahead of Starship launch
summary: SpaceX's stock price has fallen below its $135 initial public offering price as investor enthusiasm cools. The decline suggests market skepticism about the ambitious claims CEO Elon Musk made surrounding the company's potential.
content: The stock has steadily fallen from the euphoric post-IPO high, showing that markets may be sobering up to the promises CEO Elon Musk made before and after SpaceX went public.

zh.title: SpaceX股价跌破135美元IPO价格，Starship发射前夕
zh.summary: 随着投资者热情冷却，SpaceX股价已跌破135美元的首次公开募股价格。股价下跌表明市场对首席执行官埃隆·马斯克关于该公司潜力的宏大承诺存有疑虑。

title: SpaceX falls to $135 IPO price ahead of Starship launch
summary: SpaceX stock has declined from its post-IPO peak to $135 per share as markets reassess earlier optimistic valuations following CEO Elon Musk's pre- and post-IPO promises. The stock decline suggests investor sentiment is cooling despite the upcoming Starship launch milestone. This pullback reflects typical post-IPO volatility and realistic market expectations for the space exploration company.
content: The stock has steadily fallen from the euphoric post-IPO high, showing that markets may be sobering up to the promises CEO Elon Musk made before and after SpaceX went public.

zh.title: SpaceX股价跌至135美元IPO价格，星舰发射在即
zh.summary: SpaceX股票从IPO后的峰值跌至每股135美元，市场重新评估了首席执行官埃隆·马斯克在IPO前后承诺的过度乐观估值。尽管即将迎来星舰发射这一里程碑，股价下跌表明投资者情绪正在降温。这种回调反映了典型的IPO后波动性和市场对这家太空探索公司的现实期望。

title: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
summary: AI infrastructure company Thinking Machines has released Inkling, its first open-source AI model. The launch marks the company's public debut after 18 months of developing AI infrastructure largely outside public view.
content: It's the company's first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view.

zh.title: Thinking Machines推出首款开源模型Inkling，加强对抗通用型AI的投入
zh.summary: AI基础设施公司Thinking Machines发布了其首款开源AI模型Inkling。该发布标志着该公司在18个月的AI基础设施开发后首次公开亮相，这段期间公司主要在幕后运营。

title: Phone maker OnePlus reportedly plans to wind down US and Europe operations
summary: OnePlus plans to discontinue operations in the United States and European markets. The smartphone maker may also wind down its presence in India by 2027.
content: OnePlus could also wind down its operations in India by 2027.

zh.title: 手机制造商一加据悉计划逐步停止美国和欧洲业务
zh.summary: 一加计划停止在美国和欧洲市场的运营。这家智能手机制造商还可能在2027年前逐步退出印度市场。

title: Suno snatched millions of songs from YouTube, Genius, and Deezer
summary: Leaked data from a hacking incident reveals that AI music generator Suno trained its models by scraping millions of songs and lyrics from YouTube Music, Deezer, and Genius. The disclosure provides rare transparency into Suno's training sources, which the company had kept confidential while facing lawsuits alleging unauthorized use of copyrighted material.
content:
So when is fair use actually just stealing? | Cath Virginia / The Verge | Photo from Getty Images	

Suno data obtained in a hacking incident has exposed that the AI music generator was trained by scraping millions of songs and lyrics from online audio platforms, including YouTube Music, Deezer, and Genius, 404 Media reports. Given that Suno has avoided revealing what's in its training datasets and how they were acquired, this a rare glimpse into what Suno has actually been taking from online platforms.
That's relevant because Suno has been the subject of several lawsuits that allege it used copyrighted materials to train its AI models. In a notable case filed by the Recording Industry Association of America (RIAA), Suno openly admitted th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Suno从YouTube、Genius和Deezer窃取了数百万首歌曲
zh.summary: 一次黑客事件泄露的数据显示，AI音乐生成器Suno通过从YouTube Music、Deezer和Genius中抓取数百万首歌曲和歌词来训练其模型。这一披露为Suno一直保密的训练数据来源提供了罕见的透明度，同时该公司面临关于未经授权使用受版权保护材料的诉讼。

title: Google’s biggest clean power project is 40 miles north of xAI’s unpermitted gas power plant
summary: Google's largest solar and battery power project stands in geographic proximity to xAI's unpermitted gas-fired power plant located 40 miles away. The juxtaposition illustrates divergent approaches to powering AI infrastructure.
content: Google's biggest solar and battery project stands in sharp contrast with xAI's nearby unpermitted power plant.

zh.title: 谷歌最大的清洁能源项目位于xAI无许可天然气电厂以北40英里处
zh.summary: 谷歌最大的太阳能和电池储能项目在地理上邻近xAI位置40英里外的无许可燃气电厂。这种并置突出了为AI基础设施供电的不同方式。

title: Lucid’s bankruptcy rumor is a bad sign for the EV future
summary: Lucid Motors faced a stock price plunge this week after bankruptcy rumors, though the company quickly denied the speculation and cited sufficient cash reserves. Investor panic extended to rival EV makers Rivian and Polestar, reflecting concerns about the financial viability of EV-only manufacturers amid weakening demand and shifting government policy.
content:
Lucid Motors found itself in a tough bind this week, fending off bankruptcy rumors and watching its stock price plunge as a result. The company quickly denied the report, calling it "completely false" and pointing to its available free cash flow as evidence that it has enough runway to operate into next year.
But despite the swift response, the damage was widespread. The panic immediately bled into competing automakers, pulling down shares of Rivian and Polestar as investors speculated about the long-term survival of EV-only companies in the face of slowing consumer demand and whiplash policy shifts. And it cast a harsh light on the precari …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Lucid的破产谣言对电动汽车行业的未来是坏兆头
zh.summary: Lucid Motors在破产谣言后本周股价大幅下跌，尽管该公司迅速否认了这一推测并表示拥有充足的现金储备。投资者恐慌情绪波及竞争对手Rivian和Polestar，反映了人们对纯电动汽车制造商在需求疲软和政府政策变化背景下财务可行性的担忧。

title: Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data
summary: A hacker used stolen employee credentials to access Suno's source code, revealing details about how the AI music generator scraped decades of audio from YouTube. The discovery corroborates allegations in pending lawsuits that Suno used copyrighted materials without proper authorization.
content: The hacker used an employee's credentials to access source code, which revealed how Suno scraped decades of audio.

zh.title: 黑客表明AI音乐生成器Suno从YouTube抓取训练数据
zh.summary: 一名黑客使用被盗的员工凭证访问了Suno的源代码，揭示了这款AI音乐生成器如何从YouTube抓取了数十年的音频细节。这一发现证实了待决诉讼中关于Suno未经授权使用受版权保护材料的指控。

title: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
summary: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI recommendation startup Shaped to enhance its personalization engine. The acquisition will strengthen Whatnot's real-time recommendation capabilities as it expands into additional product categories.
content: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and discovery features as it expands into new product categories.

zh.title: Whatnot收购Shaped以驱动实时直播购物推荐
zh.summary: 直播购物平台Whatnot已收购AI推荐初创公司Shaped来增强其个性化引擎。随着Whatnot扩展到更多产品类别，该收购将加强其实时推荐能力。

title: Third-party app stores coming to Google Play next week as Epic settlement withdrawn
summary: Google Play will begin offering third-party app stores after Google withdrew from a settlement agreement with Epic Games. The company is now bound by the full scope of court-ordered antitrust remedies from the litigation.
content: With the settlement withdrawn, Google is now bound by the court's full antitrust remedies.

zh.title: 由于与Epic和解被撤销，第三方应用商店将登陆Google Play
zh.summary: 在Google撤销与Epic Games的和解协议后，Google Play将开始提供第三方应用商店。该公司现在受诉讼中法院命令的反垄断补救措施的完全范围的约束。

title: Microsoft patches record number of security vulnerabilities, citing its use of AI
summary: Microsoft's Patch Tuesday released a record 570 security patches across its product portfolio, with the company attributing the discovery surge to AI-assisted vulnerability detection. The dramatic increase demonstrates AI's effectiveness in identifying security issues at scale across complex software ecosystems. This milestone highlights how AI tools are becoming integral to cybersecurity operations at major tech companies.
content: Microsoft's monthly release of security fixes, dubbed Patch Tuesday, resolved a record 570 security vulnerabilities across the company's product line, thanks to discoveries with AI.

zh.title: 微软修补创纪录数量的安全漏洞，归功于AI
zh.summary: 微软补丁日在其产品组合中发布了创纪录的570个安全补丁，该公司将发现数量的增加归功于AI辅助的漏洞检测。这一戏剧性的增长证明了AI在复杂软件生态系统中大规模识别安全问题的有效性。这一里程碑突显了AI工具如何正在成为大型科技公司网络安全运营的不可或缺的一部分。

title: OpenAI's first branded hardware is... a light-up keyboard?
summary: OpenAI's first branded hardware product is the Codex Micro, a light-up keyboard designed to monitor multiple agentic threads simultaneously for its coding application. The device represents OpenAI's foray into hardware as a companion product to its software offerings. This move signals OpenAI's intent to control the full user experience around its AI services.
content: The Codex Micro is designed to monitor multiple agentic threads at a glance.

zh.title: OpenAI的首款品牌硬件是……一个发光键盘？
zh.summary: OpenAI的首款品牌硬件产品是Codex Micro，这是一款发光键盘，设计用于在其编程应用中同时监控多个智能体线程。该设备代表OpenAI进军硬件领域作为其软件产品的配套产品。这一举动表明OpenAI有意控制围绕其AI服务的完整用户体验。

title: Stripe and Advent reportedly offered to buy PayPal for around $53.4B
summary: Stripe and investment firm Advent Capital have reportedly submitted acquisition offers for PayPal valued at approximately $53.4B, potentially consolidating major players in digital payments. Such an acquisition would reshape the fintech landscape by uniting multiple payment processing and financial technology leaders. The reported interest reflects confidence in PayPal's core business despite recent market volatility.
content: If completed, the acquisition would unite two of the biggest names in digital payments.

zh.title: Stripe和Advent据报向PayPal提出约534亿美元收购要约
zh.summary: 据报道，Stripe和投资公司Advent Capital已向PayPal提交了估值约534亿美元的收购要约，有可能整合数字支付领域的主要参与者。这样的收购将通过整合多个支付处理和金融科技领导者来重塑金融科技格局。所报道的兴趣反映了尽管市场最近波动，但对PayPal核心业务的信心。

title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba’s Qwen AI
summary: Apple has secured approval to launch Apple Intelligence in China using Alibaba's Qwen AI model, marking a significant step for Apple's AI strategy in a key market. The partnership represents a pragmatic solution to China's regulatory requirements and technological sovereignty concerns. This deal demonstrates how global tech companies must adapt their AI strategies to operate in different regulatory environments.
content: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

zh.title: Apple Intelligence获批在中国推出，采用阿里巴巴通义千问AI模型
zh.summary: Apple已获批在中国使用阿里巴巴的通义千问AI模型推出Apple Intelligence，这标志着Apple在关键市场AI战略的重要一步。这一合作伙伴关系代表了对中国监管要求和技术主权问题的务实解决方案。这笔交易展示了全球科技公司如何必须调整其AI战略以在不同的监管环境中运营。

title: Inside Ode with Anthropic, the startup betting AI services are the future of enterprise
summary: Ode with Anthropic is a joint venture between Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, Goldman Sachs and others, deploying forward-deployed engineers to embed AI expertise within enterprise firms. The venture challenges traditional management consulting models by using a smaller, AI-augmented team of engineers to deliver enterprise solutions. This approach reflects the broader shift toward AI-native service delivery models in consulting and enterprise software.
content: Can a handful of engineers really do the work of an army of consultants? That’s the bet behind Ode with Anthropic — the joint venture dedicated to embedding forward-deployed engineers in enterprise firms, backed by Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, Goldman Sachs and others.   On this episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, Rebecca Bellan sits down with Ode’s leaders Chris Taylor and Eddie Siegel, who founded Fractional AI, […]

zh.title: Ode with Anthropic深度解读：这家初创企业押注AI服务是企业的未来
zh.summary: Ode with Anthropic是Anthropic、Blackstone、Hellman & Friedman、高盛和其他机构之间的合资企业，部署前沿工程师在企业公司内嵌入AI专业知识。该合资企业通过使用较小的、由AI增强的工程师团队来交付企业解决方案，挑战了传统管理咨询模式。这种方法反映了咨询和企业软件领域向AI本地服务交付模式的更广泛转变。

title: Spotify expands parent-managed accounts to users on its free tier
summary: Spotify has expanded its parent-managed account features to free-tier subscribers, previously a paid-only capability, enabling parents to create supervised accounts for their children at no cost. This expansion democratizes parental controls and child-safe music streaming on the platform. The move increases accessibility to family-focused features and may drive adoption among budget-conscious families.
content: The feature was previously only available to paid subscribers.

zh.title: Spotify为免费用户扩展父母管理账户功能
zh.summary: Spotify已将其父母管理账户功能扩展到免费订阅者,这原本仅限于付费用户。这使父母能够为孩子创建监督账户,无需付费。这一扩展使家长控制和儿童安全音乐流媒体民主化。此举增加了对家庭中心功能的可访问性,可能会提高预算有限的家庭的采用率。

title: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not models
summary: Anthropic and Blackstone-backed Ode is betting that deploying engineers inside enterprises is the key to AI adoption, shifting focus from model development to implementation services. The partnership reflects growing belief that implementation, not just models, represents the trillion-dollar opportunity in enterprise AI.
content: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.

zh.title: Anthropic和Blackstone押注下一个万亿美元的AI业务是实施而非模型
zh.summary: Anthropic和Blackstone支持的Ode押注在企业内部部署工程师是AI采用的关键，将焦点从模型开发转向实施服务。该合作伙伴关系反映了一种日益增长的信念，即实施而非仅仅是模型，代表了企业AI中万亿美元的机会。

title: Rime picks up $24M Series A to help enterprises field customer calls
summary: Rime has raised $24M in Series A funding for its enterprise AI platform that automates customer service calls. The company processes over 100 million calls monthly across multiple clients.
content: Rime is handling over 100 million calls each month across multiple companies

zh.title: Rime获得2400万美元A轮融资，帮助企业处理客户来电
zh.summary: Rime为其企业AI平台获得2400万美元A轮融资，该平台可自动化客户服务来电。该公司每月为多个客户处理超过1亿通来电。

title: Reelful’s AI turns your camera roll into short-form videos for social media
summary: Reelful is an AI app that converts smartphone photos into short-form social media videos. The tool targets users who find traditional video editing too complex or time-consuming.
content: The app is designed for people who want to create social content, but find traditional video editing tools too complex or time-consuming.

zh.title: Reelful的AI将您的手机相册转换为社交媒体短视频
zh.summary: Reelful是一个AI应用程序，可将智能手机照片转换为社交媒体短视频。该工具面向那些发现传统视频编辑过于复杂或耗时的用户。

title: The tiniest MMO
summary: PointlessQuest is an intentionally tiny MMO available exclusively on the Playdate handheld, reaching just 15 concurrent players at launch. The game contrasts sharply with World of Warcraft's 12 million peak subscribers but has attracted a dedicated niche community.
content:
At its peak, around 12 million people subscribed to World of Warcraft so that they could explore the realm of Azeroth together. The audience for PointlessQuest is quite a bit smaller. On launch day, the game hit a peak of 15 concurrent players… and no, that sentence isn't missing a word. Then again, basically everything about PointlessQuest is intentionally tiny. It's a game that was developed as a side project by designer Gareth Williams, and it's available on just about the least likely platform to house an MMO: the Playdate. Yet it has garnered a small group of hardcore players who are working together to burn through the early game exper …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 最小的大型多人在线游戏
zh.summary: PointlessQuest是一款故意设计成极小的大型多人在线游戏,仅在Playdate掌上游戏机上独家提供,首次推出时只达到15名并发玩家。该游戏与魔兽世界1200万峰值订阅用户形成鲜明对比,但吸引了一个专注的利基社区。

title: The Motorola Edge 70 Max is all about power
summary: Motorola's Edge 70 Max is the first Android phone to support full 25W wireless Qi2 charging, surpassing competitors like Google's Pixel 10 Pro XL which max at 15W. The flagship also features a 7100mAh battery designed for power-intensive tasks.
content:
Motorola has launched the Edge 70 Max, its latest flagship phone that's designed for power intensive tasks like streaming video and mobile gaming. Alongside having a huge battery and rapid wired charging support, the Motorola Edge 70 Max is the first Android phone to support full 25W wireless Qi2 charging since Google launched the Pixel 10 Pro XL last year.
Other Qi2-supported Android models, including the Pixel 10, Pixel 10 Pro, Pixel 10 Pro Fold, and the HMD Skyline are capped at 15W for magnetic wireless charging. The Edge 70 Max also has a larger 7100mAh silicon-carbon battery compared to 5200mAh on the Pixel 10 Pro XL, promising "all-d …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 摩托罗拉Edge 70 Max的全部卖点是强大
zh.summary: 摩托罗拉Edge 70 Max是首款支持全功率25W无线Qi2充电的安卓手机,超越了最高仅支持15W的谷歌Pixel 10 Pro XL等竞争对手。该旗舰机型还配备了为高耗电任务设计的7100mAh电池。

title: Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes a unicorn with $130M Series C
summary: Emergent, an Indian AI coding startup, has achieved unicorn status with a $130M Series C round. The company is backed by $120M in annualized revenue and over 200,000 paying customers.
content: The startup has reached a $120 million annualized revenue run rate and more than 200,000 paying customers.

zh.title: 印度AI编程初创公司Emergent通过1.3亿美元C轮融资成为独角兽
zh.summary: 印度AI编程初创公司Emergent通过1.3亿美元C轮融资实现了独角兽地位。该公司获得1.2亿美元年化收入和超过20万付费客户的支持。

title: Vint Cerf is working on a plan to unleash AI agents on the open internet
summary: Vint Cerf, the pioneering TCP/IP inventor, is developing standards to identify and track AI agents operating on the open internet. The effort comes as autonomous AI deployment accelerates and raises concerns about uncontrolled agent proliferation.
content: The guy behind TCP/IP is working on a standard for identifying AI agents in the wild.

zh.title: 文特·瑟夫正在制定计划在开放互联网上部署AI代理
zh.summary: 开创性TCP/IP发明者文特·瑟夫正在开发标准来识别和跟踪在开放互联网上运行的AI代理。随着自主AI部署加速，这项工作也引发了人们对无控制代理扩散的担忧。

title: Why Realta Fusion is building a fusion reactor at an old hot dog factory
summary: Realta Fusion is converting a former Oscar Mayer hot dog factory in Wisconsin into a fusion reactor research facility. The project signals the Midwest's emergence as a hub for advanced energy technology development.
content: An old Oscar Mayer factory in Wisconsin will become America's latest fusion power research and development hub.

zh.title: 为什么Realta Fusion正在废弃的热狗工厂建造核聚变反应堆
zh.summary: Realta Fusion正在将威斯康星州一家前奥斯卡·梅耶热狗工厂改建为核聚变反应堆研究设施。该项目标志着中西部作为先进能源技术发展中心的崛起。

title: Home Depot’s viral 12-foot skeleton now talks
summary: Home Depot's viral 12-foot 'Skelly' Halloween skeleton returns with AI-powered voice control via mobile app. The upgraded model, priced at $379, features expanded eye animations and debuts this summer.
content:
Skelly returns for 2026 with some new capabilities. | Image: Home Depot	

The Home Depot is once again upgrading its 12-foot-tall skeleton to help keep the viral piece of Halloween decor popular as spooky season creeps closer. Skelly is borrowing some of the tech introduced in the smaller 6.5-foot Ultra Skelly last year, including letting you speak through the skeleton's moving mouth using a mobile app. The new version of Skelly will be available online starting tomorrow for $379 and in Home Depot's stores later this summer, along with a new collection of Halloween characters.
Skelly was last upgraded two years ago with eight different animations for its animated LCD eyes, but the new version bumps that to 20 dif …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 家得宝的12英尺骷髅怪物现在会说话了
zh.summary: 家得宝备受关注的12英尺高"Skelly"万圣节骷髅怪物回归，现已具有通过移动应用进行AI语音控制的功能。升级版本售价379美元，配备扩展眼睛动画，将于今年夏天首次推出。

title: A most improbable astronaut just went to space
summary: An unlikely candidate has achieved their decades-long dream of becoming an astronaut and traveling to space. The achievement represents a remarkable personal triumph after years of setbacks and doubt.
content: "I pretty much, at that point in time, gave up on being an astronaut."

zh.title: 一位最不可能的宇航员刚刚进入太空
zh.summary: 一位不太可能的候选人实现了数十年来成为宇航员并前往太空的梦想。这一成就代表了多年挫折和怀疑后的一个显著的个人胜利。

title: How hard is it to build orbital data centers, actually?
summary: Building orbital data centers presents significant technical and cost challenges for the space industry. Developers are working to create lightweight and affordable thermal management systems that outperform the International Space Station's expensive radiators.
content: "The ISS radiators are expensive and heavy. We're focused on making them cheap and light."

zh.title: 建造轨道数据中心到底有多难？
zh.summary: 建造轨道数据中心对太空产业带来了重大的技术和成本挑战。开发人员正在努力创建轻量级且经济实惠的热管理系统，性能超过国际空间站昂贵的散热器。

title: Backed by $60M in funding, Oak steps out of stealth to fix the identity mess that AI agents are making worse
summary: Israeli startup Oak has emerged from stealth with $60M in seed funding to tackle identity verification challenges posed by AI agents. The company aims to solve authentication problems in an increasingly autonomous AI landscape.
content: Co-founded by serial entrepreneur Shai Morag, Israeli identity management startup Oak is emerging out of stealth with $60 million in seed funding.

zh.title: 获得6000万美元融资支持，Oak脱离隐身状态以解决AI代理造成的身份混乱
zh.summary: 以色列初创公司Oak从隐身状态浮出水面，获得6000万美元种子轮融资，以应对AI代理带来的身份验证挑战。该公司旨在在日益自主的AI环境中解决身份验证问题。

title: Sotheby's big T. rex auction raises concerns hype and wealth are upending science
summary: Sotheby's high-profile fossil auctions highlight a troubling trend: wealthy private collectors increasingly outbid museums for rare dinosaur specimens. This shift raises concerns about scientific research access and preservation of paleontological resources.
content: Private buyers are increasingly outbidding museums for fossils.

zh.title: 苏富比大型霸王龙拍卖引发担忧：炒作和财富正在颠覆科学
zh.summary: 苏富比高调的化石拍卖凸显了一个令人担忧的趋势：富有的私人收藏家越来越多地出价超过博物馆，争购稀有恐龙标本。这一转变引发了人们对科学研究获取和古生物资源保护的担忧。

title: A SpaceX vet raised $65M to pull wire harnesses out of the Cold War era
summary: A former SpaceX engineer has raised $65M to modernize aerospace manufacturing. The startup aims to replace outdated Cold War-era wire harness production methods used in rockets, missiles, and satellites.
content: Someone has to bundle all the wires that go into rockets, missiles, and satellites.

zh.title: SpaceX前员工融资6500万美元，旨在终结冷战时代的线束制造方式
zh.summary: 一位前SpaceX工程师筹集了6500万美元用于现代化航空航天制造。该初创公司的目标是替代在火箭、导弹和卫星中使用的过时冷战时代线束生产方法。

title: Samsung’s new foldable display is harder to crease and damage
summary: Samsung has unveiled Flex Titanium, a new foldable display technology designed to reduce creasing and improve durability. The technology will debut on the Galaxy Z Fold 8 and could potentially appear in future Apple foldable devices.
content:
Samsung’s current generation of foldables (including the pictured Galaxy Z Fold 7) still struggle with display creasing. | Photo: Allison Johnson / The Verge	

Samsung has unveiled a new flexible display technology for foldable phones that's designed to be slimmer, more durable, and less prone to creasing. The Flex Titanium tech is the culmination of everything that the company has learned over seven generations of foldables, according to Samsung, and will debut with the upcoming Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra. And since Samsung Display is a long-time Apple supplier, this improved display might even appear in the rumored iPhone foldable expected later this year.
As its name suggests, the Flex Titanium display uses a combination of two titanium-based components to improve strength, flexi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 三星新型可折叠屏幕更难出现褶皱和损伤
zh.summary: 三星推出了Flex Titanium（柔性钛金属），这是一项新的可折叠显示技术，旨在减少褶皱并提高耐久性。该技术将首次亮相Galaxy Z Fold 8，并可能出现在未来的苹果可折叠设备中。

title: Starlink’s V5 dish is now available — here’s how it compares
summary: SpaceX has launched the Starlink V5 residential dish in select areas, featuring a smaller, lighter design with improved power efficiency compared to the V4 model. The company is ramping production to meet global demand while noting the V5 is not intended for mobile use. This advancement aims to expand residential internet access while specialized solutions for in-motion applications remain in development.
content:
The smaller Starlink V5 (right) next to the larger V4 dish. | Image: SpaceX	

SpaceX's latest residential dish - the Starlink V5 - is now available in "select areas." It's notably smaller and lighter than the V4 dish with improved power efficiency. It'll be available in more places as SpaceX ramps up production to meet global demand. The company notes that Starlink V5 is not intended for in-motion use - for that you'll have to wait for the revamped Starlink Mini teased alongside the V5 last month.


The next generation Starlink Kit is designed to deliver reliable, high-speed home internet. Starlink V5 has a smaller form factor and lightweight design with greater power efficiency than the Starlink V4.
With speeds up to  …


Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Starlink V5 天线现已推出 — 以下是它与 V4 的对比
zh.summary: SpaceX 在部分地区推出了 Starlink V5 住宅卫星天线，与 V4 型号相比具有更小、更轻的设计，功耗效率更高。该公司正在提升产能以满足全球需求，同时指出 V5 不适用于移动应用。这项进展旨在扩大住宅互联网接入范围，同时针对动态应用的专门解决方案仍在开发中。

title: Google and Epic give up fighting — third-party Android app stores are coming next week
summary: Epic Games and Google have jointly withdrawn their attempt to retroactively settle their antitrust lawsuit, forcing Google to carry rival app stores within Google Play starting July 22nd. This marks a significant shift in Android's app distribution landscape, potentially opening doors for competitors like Microsoft's Xbox game store. The ruling represents a major change in how Android applications are distributed in the United States.
content:
Epic Games and Google have just jointly withdrawn their attempt to retroactively settle the lawsuit that's changing how Android app stores work in the United States - and that means Google will be forced to carry rival app stores inside of its own. In fact, Google tells the court, it's ready to begin carrying third-party app stores on Wednesday, July 22nd. Does that mean it's time for Microsoft to launch an Xbox game store on Android?
In October 2024, Judge James Donato originally agreed that forcing Google to carry rival Android app stores within its own Google Play store for several years, and forcing it to share its own entire catalog of …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌和 Epic 停止对抗 — 第三方 Android 应用商店下周推出
zh.summary: Epic Games 和谷歌已共同撤回溯及既往解决反垄断诉讼的尝试，迫使谷歌从 7 月 22 日起在 Google Play 中提供竞争对手应用商店。这标志着 Android 应用分发格局的重大转变，可能为微软 Xbox 游戏商店等竞争对手打开大门。该裁决代表了 Android 应用在美国分发方式的重大改变。

title: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang in talks to launch AI drug discovery startup valued at $2B
summary: OpenAI researcher Miles Wang is in talks to launch a new AI-focused drug discovery startup valued at $2 billion. The funding discussions highlight growing investor confidence in applying artificial intelligence to accelerate breakthroughs in life sciences research.
content: The funding discussions point to investor interest in applying AI to make breakthroughs in life sciences.

zh.title: OpenAI研究员Miles Wang计划创办估值20亿美元的AI药物发现初创公司
zh.summary: OpenAI研究员Miles Wang正在谈判创办一家新的AI药物发现初创公司，估值为20亿美元。融资讨论凸显投资者对利用人工智能加速生命科学研究突破的信心不断增长。
